params.SpellDescription: Add two mana in any combination of colors. Spend this mana only to cast Dragon creature spells.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Add two mana in any combination of colors. Spend this mana only to cast Dragon creature spells.

params.TriggerDescription: Whenever you cast a Dragon creature spell from your graveyard, it gains "When this creature dies, exile it."

params.Description: Once during each of your turns, you may cast a Dragon creature spell from your graveyard.
